about.title: About Us

about.missionText: We provide exceptional car rental services with a focus on customer satisfaction and premium vehicle quality.
about.fleetText: Wide selection of luxury and electric vehicles
about.pricesText: Competitive rates with no hidden fees

favorites.emptyText: Add cars to favorites to see them here

features.subtitle: Premium service with attention to every detail. Your comfort is our priority.

delivery.title: 2-Hour Delivery
delivery.description: We deliver your car anywhere on the island within 2 hours. Airport, hotel, or villa.

insurance.title: Full Insurance
insurance.description: All vehicles are fully insured. First-class protection for your peace of mind.

concierge.title: Concierge Service
concierge.description: Personal manager available 24/7. We solve any question.

guide.title: Island Guide
guide.description: Exclusive guide with the best locations as a gift with every rental.

cta.title: Your adventure awaits
cta.subtitle: Premium vehicles delivered to your location. Explore Phuket your way.

statistics.title: in numbers
statistics.subtitle: Facts and figures about our company

reviews.subtitle: What our clients say about us

r1.name: Alexander M.
r1.comment: Great service! Rented a BMW 3 Series for the weekend. The car was in perfect condition, paperwork was fast, staff friendly. Highly recommend!

r2.name: Elena K.
r2.comment: Rented a Hyundai Solaris for a week. Very satisfied! Fair price, clean and well-maintained car. 24/7 support was especially helpful.

r3.name: Mikhail P.
r3.comment: I rent cars here regularly for business trips. Everything is always top-notch. Wide selection, transparent conditions, no hidden fees.

hero.subtitle: Transparent rules and favorable conditions for a comfortable rental. No hidden fees or unpleasant surprises

requirements.title: Age, experience and documents
requirements.subtitle: Simple requirements for a safe and comfortable car rental
requirements.warningText: If you don't have an IDP or driver's license accepted in Thailand, the insurance may refuse to pay out and you will take on the repair risks yourself. Be sure to have all the necessary documents before your trip.

age.title: Age
age.details: Minimum age to rent a car

experience.title: Driving experience
experience.details: Driving experience must be at least 24 months

license.title: International driver's license
license.details: International driving permit is required for driving in Thailand

insurance.title: Insurance & security deposit
insurance.subtitle: Reliable protection for your peace of mind during the trip

fullInsurance.title: Full insurance
fullInsurance.description: All vehicles are insured at first-class or business-class level

deposit.title: Security deposit
deposit.description: From $200 to $800 depending on the selected vehicle

franchise.title: Deductible
franchise.description: From 3,000 to 7,000 baht according to the insurance terms

depositCard.title: Security deposit
depositCard.text: The deposit amount is set by the lessor and listed on each vehicle's card. The deposit is held on your card at the moment you pick up the car.

franchiseCard.title: Deductible
franchiseCard.text: A deductible is the amount you pay on top in the event of an insurance claim. The size depends on the type of insurance.

delivery.title: Delivery & mileage
delivery.subtitle: Convenient delivery and fair mileage terms

anyLocation.title: Delivery anywhere
anyLocation.description: We deliver the car or bike to a location convenient for you

fullTank.title: Full tank
fullTank.description: The vehicle is always delivered clean and with a full tank

deliveryCard.title: Delivery
deliveryCard.convenienceText: If you don't have time to refuel and wash the car on return — we'll do it for you (we'll provide receipts)

mileageCard.title: Mileage
mileageCard.fairText: 150 km per day is enough for comfortable travel around the island. Excess is charged at fair rates.

booking.title: Booking
booking.subtitle: Simple car or bike booking process in just 3 steps

passportPhoto.title: Passport photo
passportPhoto.description: A clear photo of all pages of the document

licensePhoto.title: Driver's license photo
licensePhoto.description: Both sides of the IDP or national license

booking.confirmText: After receiving all documents and prepayment, we confirm your booking within 2 hours. You'll get detailed information about the pickup location and time, as well as contact details.

service.title: Customer service
service.subtitle: Full comfort and professional service at every stage
service.giftText: A Phuket guide with top spots and Instagrammable locations

validation.firstName: First name must be at least 2 characters
validation.lastName: Last name must be at least 2 characters

bookingForm.managerNotice: After confirmation, our manager will contact you to clarify details and arrange payment.
bookingForm.fillStep3: Please complete all fields in step 3:
bookingForm.genericError: An error occurred during booking. Please try again later.

bookingConfirmation.subtitle: Your request has been sent. Our manager will contact you shortly to confirm.
bookingConfirmation.step1: Manager will contact you to clarify details
bookingConfirmation.step2: Confirm the booking and payment method
bookingConfirmation.step3: Pick up the car at your chosen location

termsPage.subtitle: Transparent rules and favorable conditions. No hidden fees
termsPage.warning: Without an IDP the insurer may refuse to pay. You take on repair risk yourself.
termsPage.passportPhotoDetails: A clear photo of all pages
termsPage.confirmNote: After receiving the documents we confirm the booking within 2 hours.
termsPage.insuranceText: All cars are insured at first-class level
termsPage.franchiseText: From 3,000 to 7,000 ฿ (~$85–200) in case of an insurance event
